title: Review the overview dashboard and switch the time period
description: This test verifies that a user can view the overview dashboard’s brand health metrics and refresh them by switching the period filter.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Change the period filter
Verify the brand health score, sentiment donut, tone trend, and top issues are displayed
Verify the displayed data refreshes for the selected period

title: View brand health and refresh by period
description: This verifies that the dashboard shows the core brand health metrics and updates them when the period filter changes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the dashboard shows brand health and sentiment overview data
Change the period filter to a different range
Verify the dashboard metrics refresh for the selected period

title: Browse all mentions with the default view
description: This verifies that the mentions page loads a populated table with the total mention count visible to the user.
category: All Mentions with filters and detail

steps.description: Navigate to /mentions
Verify a populated mentions table is displayed
Verify the total mention count is visible

title: Import a valid mention file and verify counts refresh
description: This test verifies that a user can import a CSV or JSON mention file in Sources and see inserted versus skipped counts along with refreshed mention totals.

steps.description: Navigate to /sources
Choose a valid CSV or JSON file to import
Submit the import
Verify inserted and skipped counts are displayed
Verify the mention total refreshes after the import

title: Open mention details with analysis and source context
description: This verifies that a user can open a mention and inspect its AI analysis, raw payload, and source link from the detail page.
category: All Mentions with filters and detail

steps.description: Navigate to /mentions
Open a mention from the table
Verify the mention detail page shows AI analysis
Verify the raw source payload and source link are visible

title: Import a CSV file of mentions
description: This verifies that uploading a CSV mention file completes successfully and reports inserted versus skipped rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /sources
Choose a CSV file for import
Submit the import
Verify a success status message is visible
Verify inserted and skipped counts are reported

title: Filter mentions and view the updated results
description: This verifies that applying mention filters updates the table and the visible query state to match the selected criteria.
category: All Mentions with filters and detail

steps.description: Navigate to /mentions
Apply a platform filter
Apply a sentiment filter
Verify the mentions table updates to the filtered results
Verify the active filter state is visible

title: Browse mentions and open a mention detail
description: This test verifies that a user can filter or browse mentions, open a specific mention, and see AI analysis plus raw source context.

steps.description: Navigate to /mentions
Apply a filter or saved view
Open a mention from the table
Verify the mention detail view is displayed
Verify AI analysis and raw source context are displayed

title: See new imported mentions reflected across the app
description: This verifies that after importing mention data, the sources page refreshes and the new mention data is visible in browsing views.

steps.description: Navigate to /sources
Choose a CSV file for import
Submit the import
Return to the sources page view after import completes
Verify the mention total has increased
Verify the imported data is available in mention browsing views

title: Inspect top issues from the dashboard
description: This verifies that users can open the top issues view from the dashboard and see issue-focused data for investigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the top issues view for a prominent issue
Verify issue-focused mention data is displayed
Verify related trend data is displayed

title: Drill into the top issue from the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a user can start on the Overview Dashboard and open a related issue or mention path for deeper investigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a top issue from the dashboard
Open a related mention from the issue context
Verify the related mention detail view is displayed
Verify the issue context is visible in the drill-down flow

title: Generate a daily report and see it added to the list
description: This verifies that a user can generate a daily brand report from the reports list and see the new report appear with summary metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Select the daily report type
Click the report generation action
Verify a new report appears in the list
Verify report summary metrics are displayed

title: Generate content ideas from brand insights
description: This verifies that the content ideas page shows generated ideas derived from mention data.

steps.description: Navigate to /content-ideas
Verify generated content ideas are displayed
Verify each idea includes a rationale or priority context

title: Generate and review new content ideas
description: This test verifies that a user can generate new content ideas from the Content Idea Engine and see refreshed cards with the expected idea details.

steps.description: Navigate to /content-ideas
Verify the active ideas count and idea cards are displayed
Click the action to generate new ideas
Verify new idea cards are displayed
Verify the idea cards include priority, insight, audience pain, hook, angle, CTA, and why-now rationale

title: Generate a monthly report and export it as PDF
description: This verifies that a user can generate a monthly brand report, open it, and start the PDF export flow from the report detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Select the monthly report type
Click the report generation action
Open the generated report detail view
Export the report as PDF
Verify the report export action is available on the detail page
Verify the report detail remains visible after export is initiated

title: Use a saved mention view
description: This verifies that selecting a saved view applies its preset filters and shows the corresponding mentions list.
category: All Mentions with filters and detail

steps.description: Navigate to /mentions
Select a saved view
Verify the preset filter state is applied
Verify the mentions table updates to the saved view results

title: Change an idea status to save use or archive
description: This verifies that a user can update an idea status and see the changed state reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /content-ideas
Change an idea status to saved
Change an idea status to used
Change an idea status to archived
Verify the idea status is updated in the list
Verify the updated status remains visible after the change

title: Generate a weekly report and open its detail view
description: This verifies that a newly generated weekly report can be opened from the list and its detail page is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Select the weekly report type
Click the report generation action
Open the generated report detail view
Verify the report detail page is displayed
Verify report insights are displayed

title: Import a JSON file of mentions
description: This verifies that uploading a JSON mention file completes successfully and reports inserted versus skipped rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /sources
Choose a JSON file for import
Submit the import
Verify a success status message is visible
Verify inserted and skipped counts are reported

title: Follow a mention source link
description: This test verifies that a user can open a mention detail and follow the original source link from the mention context.

steps.description: Navigate to /mentions
Open a mention from the table
Click the source link
Verify the source destination is opened or indicated by the browser
Verify the mention context remains accessible from the detail view

title: Generate content from a topic
description: This test verifies that a user can submit a topic in Generate Content and receive generated hooks, body copy, caption text, and a CTA.
category: Generate Content: hook and caption generation

steps.description: Navigate to /generate-content
Fill in the topic field with a relevant campaign topic
Select a platform
Select a content format
Select a goal
Submit the content generator form
Verify generated hook options, content sections, caption text, and a CTA are displayed

title: Generate a hook and caption pair
description: This verifies that a user can generate content suggestions and see the resulting hook and caption content.

steps.description: Navigate to /generate-content
Generate content suggestions
Verify generated hook content is displayed
Verify generated caption content is displayed

title: Open a report and export it as PDF
description: This verifies that a generated report can be opened and exported from its detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Open a report from the list
Export the report as PDF
Verify the report detail view is displayed
Verify the export action is available from the report detail view

title: Browse the reports list and generate a report
description: This test verifies that a user can create a daily, weekly, or monthly report from the Reports page and see it added to the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Choose a report period
Generate the report
Verify the reports list shows the newly created report
Verify the report is available with its expected period

title: Generate reports of multiple frequencies from the same page
description: This verifies that the user can create different report frequencies from the reports page and see each report added as expected.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Select the daily report type
Click the report generation action
Select the monthly report type
Click the report generation action
Verify multiple generated reports are visible in the list
Verify the newest report appears first

title: Generate a report from an empty reports list
description: This verifies that the reports page correctly handles an empty starting state and still allows report creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Verify an empty state message is visible
Select the daily report type
Click the report generation action
Verify a new report appears in the list

title: Review generated content with rubric feedback
description: This verifies that the hook and caption reviewer accepts a review and adds it to review history.

steps.description: Navigate to /generate-content
Open the review area for generated content
Enter a review comment
Submit the review
Verify the review is added to history
Verify the review feedback is visible

title: Change an idea status and see it update
description: This test verifies that a user can change a content idea’s status and see the card reflect the updated status badge.

steps.description: Navigate to /content-ideas
Click the save status action on an idea card
Verify the idea card shows the saved status
Click the used status action on the same idea card
Verify the idea card shows the used status
Click the archive status action on the same idea card
Verify the idea card shows the archived status

title: Create a daily report
description: This verifies that a user can generate a daily report and see it listed in reports.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Generate a daily report
Verify the new report appears in the reports list
Verify the report type is daily

title: Create a weekly report
description: This verifies that a user can generate a weekly report and see it listed in reports.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Generate a weekly report
Verify the new report appears in the reports list
Verify the report type is weekly

title: Review a caption and see rubric scoring history
description: This test verifies that a user can submit a hook or caption for review and see rubric scoring plus a new history entry.
category: Generate Content: hook and caption review

steps.description: Navigate to /generate-content
Scroll to the review section
Fill in the review text field with a caption or hook
Select a platform for review
Submit the review form
Verify a scored rubric breakdown and overall score are displayed
Verify the review history shows a new entry at the top

title: Browse existing reports without generating a new one
description: This verifies that a user can review the current reports list and open an existing report detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Verify report cards or an empty state are visible
Open an existing report detail view
Verify the report detail page is displayed

title: Create a monthly report
description: This verifies that a user can generate a monthly report and see it listed in reports.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Generate a monthly report
Verify the new report appears in the reports list
Verify the report type is monthly

title: Skip duplicate mention rows during import
description: This test verifies that duplicate rows in an imported mention file are skipped and only unique rows are inserted.

steps.description: Navigate to /sources
Choose a CSV or JSON file with duplicate mention rows to import
Submit the import
Verify duplicate rows are reported as skipped
Verify only unique rows are counted as inserted

title: Open report detail from the newest generated report
description: This verifies that the most recently generated report can be opened and viewed from the reports list.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Select the daily report type
Click the report generation action
Open the newest report detail view
Verify the report detail page is displayed

title: Copy generated content and see confirmation
description: This test verifies that a user can copy a generated result in Generate Content and see the copied confirmation state.
category: Generate Content: hook and caption generation

steps.description: Navigate to /generate-content
Fill in the topic field with a relevant campaign topic
Submit the content generator form
Click the copy action for a generated result
Verify a copied confirmation state is visible

title: Copy generated content to the clipboard state
description: This verifies that copying generated content shows a confirmation state to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /generate-content
Generate content suggestions
Copy generated content
Verify a copy confirmation state is visible

title: See report generation loading feedback
description: This verifies that the user receives visible loading feedback while a report is being generated.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Select the weekly report type
Click the report generation action
Verify a loading state is visible
Verify the generated report appears afterward

title: Prevent invalid source imports
description: This verifies that unsupported or invalid import files are rejected with a visible validation error before data is added.

steps.description: Navigate to /sources
Choose an unsupported or invalid file for import
Submit the import
Verify a file validation error is visible
Verify no import success message is shown

title: View secondary intelligence pages from the app navigation
description: This test verifies that a user can open the secondary intelligence views and each page loads its own content area.

steps.description: Navigate to /alerts
Verify the alerts view is displayed
Navigate to /trend-radar
Verify the trend radar view is displayed
Navigate to /sociograph
Verify the sociograph view is displayed

title: Handle an empty content ideas state
description: This verifies that the content ideas page shows an empty state when no ideas are available to review.

steps.description: Navigate to /content-ideas
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no generated ideas are displayed

title: Handle empty states for key creation views
description: This test verifies that empty-state messaging is shown when there are no reports or ideas available to review.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Verify an empty state message is displayed when no reports are available
Navigate to /content-ideas
Verify an empty state message is displayed when no ideas are available

title: See an empty reports state
description: This verifies that the reports page shows an empty state when no reports have been generated yet.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no reports are listed

title: Open the in-app guide and settings pages
description: This test verifies that a user can navigate to the guide and settings views and see their page content.

steps.description: Navigate to /guide
Verify the in-app guide content is displayed
Navigate to /settings
Verify the settings page content is displayed
